summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AVA is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $39.89. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 20.0%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $42.48 and a significant trendline confluence around $42.18 (formed by 9 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
